stylePrompt: Create a completely original Modern Zen lighting product that transforms East Asian spatial philosophy into a quiet contemporary object. Use disciplined negative space, poised asymmetry, restrained botanical curves, and calm natural materials. References to magnolia, calla lily, silk, paper, stone, and ink should be abstract and structural, never literal decoration. The lamp must feel breathable, contemplative, refined, and suited to modern urban interiors.
specificElements: A magnolia-petal diffuser reduced to one pure curve
A calla-lily stem translated into a slim support
A luminous paper plane floating beside stone
An asymmetrical composition balanced by empty space
A concealed light washing across textured silk
A low horizontal form inspired by a meditation platform
